skill_availability_goal: Verify unified pre-tag stamping, complete candidate producer schema without final success, two staged gates, anchor confirmation, fixed discovery handoff, and ready_for_tag only after integration, while release metadata stays read-only.
prompt: 维护者明确确认本次 pre-tag audit 的 `target_release_version` 为 `v1.1.0`，显式 `base_ref` 为 `a1b2c3d`、`target_ref` 为 `b2c3d4e`，且匹配 tag 尚不存在。请审计 fixture；仅在完整影响域和所有 release-version surfaces 全部通过时统一盖章并持久化报告。`.meta/releases.json` 由 #116 维护，本审计只能读取核对。
